name: check-all-byte-identical-templates
description: check:all standard adoption: scripts/check-all.ts and scripts/check-ci-parity.ts are byte-identical fleet templates (cmp against templates/l5-toolkit/scripts/) — never edit them; biome formatting conflicts are resolved with a biome.json override disabling the formatter for exactly those two files (plot's convention), and CI-parity escape hatches go in scripts/ci-parity-config.json (test:ci aliased to check:coverage; report:* steps ciOnly)

biome ^2.4.6 formats the l5-toolkit check-all/check-ci-parity scripts differently than the fleet baseline, so lint fails on the byte-identical copies. Also: newer biome scanners emit internalError/fs warnings walking the local .bun cache dir
resolution: Bump @biomejs/biome to ^2.4.14, add a biome.json override disabling the formatter for scripts/check-all.ts and scripts/check-ci-parity.ts (never reformat the byte-identical scripts), and exclude !**/.bun in files.includes
